prompt: Create a dynamic cinematic anime-style action poster of VEYA, a young warrior sprinting and lunging low across a rocky desert canyon at sunset. The composition is wide 16:9, with an extreme low-angle perspective and strong motion blur: the character is centered, hair whipping wildly backward, one huge stone-and-crystal armored hand reaching toward the viewer in foreshortened perspective, the other arm pulled behind, legs spread in a powerful running leap. The outfit is dark tactical clothing in charcoal and black, with organic jagged pale stone armor wrapping the forearm, hand, shin guards, and rugged shoes; the armor looks like layered shards of bone, crystal, and rock. Add flying gravel, dust explosions at both feet, scattered debris suspended in the air, and canyon walls receding into a bright hazy sunlit background. Use warm beige, sand, sepia, and smoky gray tones, high contrast lighting, detailed painterly linework, and an epic manga-meets-concept-art finish. Across the top, place the large thin uppercase title text VEYA in a minimalist widely spaced geometric font, dark gray, spanning nearly the full width. Keep the face hidden by a centered opaque square censor block in muted brown, covering the facial features while leaving the hair, ears, body pose, and action readable. No additional text, no watermark.
